queries.query: Review my manuscript like a serious conference reviewer and tell me the biggest validity risks.
Run a quick audit on paper.tex and tell me what blocks submission.
Gate this IEEE submission and separate blockers from advisory recommendations.
Re-audit this revision against my previous review report and tell me what's still open.
Audit only the literature positioning and tell me whether the claimed gap is real or fabricated.
审稿一下这篇论文，给我一份重大/次要问题清单。
投稿前体检一下，看看能不能投。
把把关，重新审一遍这篇修改稿，跟上一轮意见对比。
Write a SCI-style peer review report with Summary / Major Issues / Minor Issues / Recommendation.
Audit this PDF as a journal reviewer would and flag the methodology weaknesses.
Simulate peer review for my .typ manuscript and produce major/minor findings.
Proofread my IEEE conference paper and fix grammar issues directly in the .tex file.
Fix my Typst compile error in main.typ.
检查我的中文硕士学位论文 GB/T 7714 格式问题。
Search my references.bib for Mamba forecasting papers after 2024.
Polish a single paragraph of my paper's introduction without changing meaning.
Help me draft a cover letter for journal submission.
Set up a Docker container for my deep learning experiments.
